title: 30 Pcs Badge Making Kit, 44mm Make Your Own Badges Buttons, Acrylic Clear Badge Maker, Personalised Button Pin Badges Kit for DIY Crafts Decoration Gifts Party Bag Fillers
features: Premium Materials: Made of clear acrylic with a polished finish, the badge making kit offers impressive clarity and strength. Smooth to the touch with neatly rounded edges, it's designed for repeated handling while keeping your design clearly visible.

For Custom Decoration: Perfect for enhancing your projects - add style to jackets, hats, bags or design personalized name tags. Badges make your own offer endless options for scrapbook pages, handmade labels or themed display pieces.

No Tools Required: Designed for easy assembly - just lift the top, place your work inside, and press firmly to close the back. The back indent helps you easily open them again so you can quickly swap out the contents at any time.

Multiple Uses: make your own badges are suitable for photo buttons, event signs or handmade designs. Perfect for decorating clothes, bags or hats. Perfect for weddings, office parties, school projects, party favors and other group occasions.

Generous Project Set: This set of 30 pcs acrylic clear button pins has an outer diameter of 44mm/1.73" and an inner window of 39mm/1.54". Perfect for craft classes - add your own photos, drawings or prints to create truly personalised pieces.
description: What are the benefits of our clear badges? 1. Premium Material: Made from hard acrylic, these clear badges feel smooth and have a polished look. Durable and reusable, they are perfect for displaying printed patterns, names or hand-drawn sketches. 2. DIY Set: Contains 30 badges in total for you to use for group activities, amateur crafts or to create your own badge display. 3. Ideal for craft lovers: Whether you are decorating accessories, picking out gifts, or planning a themed workshop, these badges allow you to personalise your designs in a clean and simple way. 4. Easy assembly for crafting: Simply open the lid, put in the pattern of your choice and snap the top shut, no tools required. The small groove on the back allows for easy removal when changing designs, perfect for multiple uses. 5. Suitable for various occasions: Whether you are preparing party favors, making souvenirs or designing event badges, these blank badges are suitable for school events, exhibitions, club activities or gift bags - bringing a personalized experience wherever you go.
